papers_mined.title: Glíma Wikipedia Icelandic Wrestling
papers_mined.note: Glíma: Iceland's national sport; Brókartök trouser-belt-grip variant; fixed one-hand-belt + one-hand-thigh grip; technique-over-strength philosophy + honor code (no push-down).

papers_mined.title: Glima Icelandic Wrestling Grapplezilla
papers_mined.note: Fixed grip + balanced upright position; throws via trip not push; honor: opponent falls gracefully; modern competition since 1888 + belt since 1905.

papers_mined.title: Art of Glima Viking Tradition
papers_mined.note: Glíma Viking heritage: Jónsbók 1325; technique-based wrestling; fixed-grip start position required for all matches.

papers_mined.title: Glíma Iceland Traditional Sports
papers_mined.note: Strict fixed-grip stance + circular footwork; trip-throw via balance disruption; technique-over-strength honor code; women's competition equal.
